zh.lifeSummary: 當John Semark於1421年出生在英國林可爾史爾斯坦福時，他的父親Nicholas De Semarc III44歲，母親Elizabeth Tame41歲。他於大約1446年與Anne Neville結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1483年在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾恩豪享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Semark于1421年出生在英国林可爾史爾斯坦福时，他的父亲Nicholas De Semarc III44岁，母亲Elizabeth Tame41岁。他于大约1446年与Anne Neville结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1483年在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾恩豪享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: John

meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Semark was born in 1421, in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Nicholas De Semarc III, was 44 and his mother, Elizabeth Tame, was 41. He married Anne Neville about 1446. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1483, in Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Semark est né en 1421, à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas De Semarc III, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Tame, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Anne Neville environ 1446. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1483, à Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Semark 1421 in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas De Semarc III 44 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Tame 41. Er hat um 1446 Anne Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1483 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Semark è nato il nel 1421 nel Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Nicholas De Semarc III, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Tame, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Anne Neville circa 1446. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1483, nel Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Semarkが1421年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードで生まれた時，父Nicholas De Semarc IIIは44歳，母Elizabeth Tameは41歳であった。約1446年にAnne Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1483年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアソルンハウで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Semark(이)가 1421년 영국 링코실르 스타퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas De Semarc III(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Tame(은)는 41세였다. 그는 대략 1446년 Anne Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1483년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 토른하우그h에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Semark nasceu em 1421, em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas De Semarc III, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Tame, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Neville aproximadamente 1446. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1483, em Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Semark родился в 1421 г. в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas De Semarc III было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Tame, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Neville около 1446 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1483 г. в местности таурно, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Semark nació en 1421, en Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas De Semarc III, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Tame, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Anne Neville aproximadamente 1446. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1483, en Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años.
